$comment: Per-tournament Telegram channel fan-out. Channel ids are either '@username' for public channels the bot has admin on, or numeric '-100xxxxxxxxxx' for private supergroups. Set `enabled: false` to pause without removing config. The adapter posts via the Telegram Bot API (or via the tournament-bot's HTTP push endpoint if TOURNAMENT_BOT_PUSH_URL is set).

wc26.$comment: Replace with real channel ids -- the bot must be admin on each channel for sendVideo to succeed.

fifa-wc-2022.$comment: Demo channel for the AR-FR replay. Suggest @VTournClipsDemo.

default.$comment: Fallback chat list. If empty, fan-out skips Telegram for unmapped tournaments.
